author: anon-a7c6025f
content: The dispatch layer in ferrotorch-core already calls backend.div_f32(), exp_f32(), etc. — the GpuBackend trait has default impls that return 'not yet implemented' errors. Need to: (1) write PTX kernels in ferrotorch-gpu/src/kernels.rs, (2) implement the backend methods in backend_impl.rs. Also adding sigmoid_f32 and tanh_f32 forward since they're in the same state.
